description.s: Prose editor for Active Text. Per-block contenteditable with native inline text editing, markdown shortcuts, and @ autocomplete. Press Ctrl+/ to see all keyboard shortcuts.
: Merge with previous block (at start of block)
: Merge with next block (at end of block)
Type the trigger at the start of an empty paragraph, then press Space (or Enter for horizontal rules):
: Insert item reference, link, or transclusion
